paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. was 6.65 as of July 21, 2026, with an 8.66 percent increase from the prior close and a 25.86 percent decrease over a 21-session window.

Recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, set for August 13, 2026, as well as discussions of the company's stock performance and governance concerns. A director's resignation and a $375 million convertible senior notes offering have also been reported.

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing a director's resignation, an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and a SCHEDULE 13G filing.
